title: galium mollugo var. falcatum
intro: Galium mollugo var. falcatum, also known as cleavers or bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Galium mollugo var. falcatum include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of cleavers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
